evals.prompt: 画一个泰勒图对比我的回归模型
evals.expected_output: A Taylor diagram PNG/PDF showing multiple model markers on a polar plot with CRMSD contours
expectations: The output includes a Taylor diagram figure
The TaylorDiagram class is used with add_model() and plot()

evals.prompt: Create a Taylor diagram comparing SVR, RF, and XGBoost predictions
evals.expected_output: A publication-quality Taylor diagram with 3 model markers and a reference point
expectations: Each model has a distinct marker and color
The diagram includes a title and legend

evals.prompt: 计算各模型的标准差、相关系数和中心化均方根误差
evals.expected_output: A formatted statistics table with Std, Corr, and CRMSD columns
expectations: Output includes standard deviation, correlation, and CRMSD values
The observed reference row shows Std=1.0, Corr=1.0, CRMSD=0.0

evals.expected_output: A Taylor diagram created via the SkillMetrics library API
expectations: The diagram follows SkillMetrics array ordering convention
